expectations.text: report.md exists and documents start/stop/final process check with real evidence
expectations.evidence: report.md has baseline, RUNNING (session list ram1 running:true, status via ram1 socket), dry-run inventory, shutdown, and process-free sections with captured JSON
session list --json shows ram1 running:true, PID 4192, 14MB; status --json via HERDR_SOCKET_PATH shows running, protocol 19
report shows default running:false throughout; only ram1 stopped
herdr-cleanup.ps1 -DryRun safety inventory first (live_agents:[]), then graceful cleanup: result clean, force_killed []
